headline: Intercontinental Exchange Chief Operating Officer Stuart Williams to Present at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange and Trading Conference on June 3rd
summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, May 20, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), one of the world’s leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, announced today that Stuart Williams, Chief Operating Officer, will present at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange and Trading Conference. The presentation will take place on Wednesday, June 3 at 10:00 a.m. ET. The presentation will be available live and in replay via webcast and can be accessed in the investor r

headline: NYSE Content Update: Lincoln International Valued at $2 Billion after $420 Million IPO
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.

headline: How ICE’s Planned GPU Compute Futures Could Reshape Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Investors’ AI Narrative
summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. recently announced plans with Ornn to launch US dollar-denominated, cash-settled GPU compute futures contracts based on Ornn’s live-traded Compute Price Index, subject to regulatory approval. This move brings ICE’s derivatives expertise into the rapidly evolving AI infrastructure market, creating a new way to hedge and benchmark GPU compute costs. We’ll now examine how ICE’s entry into GPU compute futures trading could influence its investment narrative...
